sign_up.title: Welcome to {{app_name}}!
sign_up.body: 🎉 You're all set to start exploring amazing meals near you.

login.title: Welcome back, {{name}}!
login.body: We missed you — great to see you again.

profile_updated.title: Profile updated successfully!
profile_updated.body: Keep your info current for faster delivery.

password_change.title: Password Updated!
password_change.body: 🔐 Your password has been successfully changed.

security_alert.title: New Login Detected
security_alert.body: ⚠️ Someone just logged into your account from a new device. If this wasn't you, reset your password immediately.

order_created.title: Order Received!
order_created.body: 🛍 Your order #{{order_id}} has been placed successfully.

vendor_accepted_order.title: Order Confirmed!
vendor_accepted_order.body: Your vendor has accepted your order and is preparing it.

rider_assigned.title: Rider On the Way!
rider_assigned.body: 🚴 {{rider_name}} is heading to pick up your order.

order_picked_up.title: Order Picked Up!
order_picked_up.body: Your rider has collected your order and is en route.

order_delivered.title: Delivered!
order_delivered.body: 🎉 Your order #{{order_id}} has arrived. Enjoy your meal!

order_cancelled.title: Order Cancelled
order_cancelled.body: We're sorry — your order was cancelled. Refunds (if any) will be processed shortly.

delivery_delayed.title: Slight Delay
delivery_delayed.body: Your delivery might take a little longer than expected. Thanks for your patience!

payment_failed.title: Payment Unsuccessful
payment_failed.body: ⚠️ Please retry your payment for order #{{order_id}}.

referral_reward_earned.title: Congrats!
referral_reward_earned.body: 🎁 You've earned {{reward_details}}. Invite more friends to earn more.

festive_seasonal_message.title: Happy Holidays!
festive_seasonal_message.body: 🎄 Treat yourself today with our special deals.

after_delivery.title: How was your order?
after_delivery.body: ⭐ Rate your experience to help us serve you better.

support_response.title: Support Update
support_response.body: Your issue #{{ticket_id}} has been resolved. Thanks for your patience!

system_maintenance.title: Scheduled Maintenance
system_maintenance.body: 🛠 Some features may be unavailable from {{start_time}} to {{end_time}}.

location_restriction.title: Out of Range
location_restriction.body: 📍 You're currently outside our delivery area. Please update your location to continue.

sign_up.title: Welcome to {{app_name}}!
sign_up.body: 🎉 You're now part of our vendor network. Let's start earning.

account_approved.title: Account Approved!
account_approved.body: ✅ You're ready to start accepting orders.

account_rejected.title: Account Review Update
account_rejected.body: ❌ Unfortunately, your account didn't meet our requirements. Please review and try again.

login.title: Welcome back!
login.body: 👋 Ready to serve your next customer?

security_alert.title: New Login Detected
security_alert.body: ⚠️ If this wasn't you, reset your password immediately.

new_order_received.title: New Order Alert!
new_order_received.body: 🛒 Order #{{order_id}} just came in. Review and accept now.

payment_confirmed.title: Payment Received
payment_confirmed.body: 💰 Your earnings for order #{{order_id}} have been added to your wallet.

admin_promo.title: Vendor Update
admin_promo.body: 📣 Check out our new vendor incentives and promotions.

low_sales_reminder.title: Boost Your Sales!
low_sales_reminder.body: ⚡ Try offering discounts or updating your menu to attract more buyers.

new_feature_announcement.title: New Tools Added!
new_feature_announcement.body: 🧰 Explore our latest vendor dashboard features now.

system_maintenance.title: Scheduled Maintenance
system_maintenance.body: 🛠 Certain vendor features may be unavailable from {{start_time}} to {{end_time}}.

sign_up.title: Welcome to {{app_name}}!
sign_up.body: 🚴 You're one step closer to earning with deliveries.

account_approved.title: Account Approved!
account_approved.body: ✅ You can now start accepting delivery requests.

account_rejected.title: Account Review Update
account_rejected.body: ❌ Your account could not be approved. Please review your submission.

password_change.title: Password Updated!
password_change.body: 🔐 Your password has been successfully changed.

security_alert.title: New Login Detected
security_alert.body: ⚠️ Your account was accessed from a new device. If this wasn't you, reset your password now.

new_order_available.title: New Delivery Available!
new_order_available.body: 🚨 Check your app to accept order #{{order_id}}.

order_accepted.title: Delivery Accepted!
order_accepted.body: 📦 You've accepted order #{{order_id}}. Pick it up soon.

delivery_delayed.title: Delivery Reminder
delivery_delayed.body: ⏳ Ensure timely delivery for a better rating.

order_cancelled.title: Order Cancelled
order_cancelled.body: Customer cancelled order #{{order_id}}. No worries, more orders coming!

admin_promo.title: Top Riders Earn More!
admin_promo.body: 💰 Check out our latest bonuses and incentives.

weekly_performance.title: Weekly Summary
weekly_performance.body: You completed {{delivery_count}} deliveries this week. Keep it up!

system_maintenance.title: System Maintenance
system_maintenance.body: 🛠 Certain delivery features will be paused from {{start_time}} to {{end_time}}.
